# Pinned Python tool versions used by meta/scripts/codegen.sh.
#
# These versions are reproduced by CI in .github/workflows/ci.yml and should be
# installed locally before running `pnpm codegen` or `pnpm codegen:check` to
# avoid generator drift between machines. The pin set is updated together with
# the committed generated files under meta/generated/python and
# packages/shared/src/generated.
#
# Install:
#   python3 -m pip install -r meta/scripts/codegen-requirements.txt

datamodel-code-generator==0.57.0
ruff==0.15.13
